assert (Hdir : isDirected (E.image f X)) by (apply isDirected_intro; [destruct DIRECTED as [[x Hx] DIR]; exists (f x); apply In_image with x; auto | intros a b Ha Hb; destruct Ha as [x ? Hx], Hb as [y ? Hy]; subst; destruct (DIR x y Hx Hy) as [z [Hz [le1 le2]]]; exists (f z); split; [apply In_image with z; auto | split; apply ScottContinuousMap_isMonotonic; assumption]]). pose proof (f_sup_X_eq_sup_image_f_X D D' PROSET PROSET' CPO CPO' f X sup_X CONTINUIOUS DIRECTED SUPREMUM Hdir) as Heq_sup. pose proof (supremum_cpo_spec (E.image f X) Hdir) as Hsup_sup. split.
- intro Hsup. apply (leProp_PartialOrder (f sup_X) sup_Y); split.
-- apply (proj2 leProp_PreOrder (f sup_X) (supremum_cpo (E.image f X) Hdir) sup_Y);
      [ apply (fst (proj1 (leProp_PartialOrder (f sup_X) (supremum_cpo (E.image f X) Hdir)) Heq_sup))
      | apply (proj2 (Hsup_sup sup_Y)); apply (proj1 (Hsup sup_Y)); apply (proj1 leProp_PreOrder _) ].
-- apply (proj2 leProp_PreOrder sup_Y (supremum_cpo (E.image f X) Hdir) (f sup_X));
      [ apply (proj2 (Hsup (supremum_cpo (E.image f X) Hdir))); apply (proj1 (Hsup_sup (supremum_cpo (E.image f X) Hdir))); apply (proj1 leProp_PreOrder _)
      | apply (snd (proj1 (leProp_PartialOrder (f sup_X) (supremum_cpo (E.image f X) Hdir)) Heq_sup)) ].
- intro Heq. apply (fun (a b : D') (S : E.t D') (Heq_eq : eqProp a b) (Hb : is_supremum_of b S) => (fun u => let (H1, H2) := Hb u in (let (H3, H4) := proj1 (leProp_PartialOrder a b) Heq_eq in conj (fun H5 : leProp a u => H1 (proj2 leProp_PreOrder b a u H4 H5)) (fun H6 : E.In u (upperboundsOf S) => proj2 leProp_PreOrder a b u H3 (H2 H6))))) sup_Y (f sup_X) (E.image f X) Heq (fun u => let (H1, H2) := Hsup_sup u in (let (H3, H4) := proj1 (leProp_PartialOrder (f sup_X) (supremum_cpo (E.image f X) Hdir)) Heq_sup in conj (fun H5 : leProp (f sup_X) u => H1 (proj2 leProp_PreOrder (supremum_cpo (E.image f X) Hdir) (f sup_X) u H4 H5)) (fun H6 : E.In u (upperboundsOf (E.image f X)) => proj2 leProp_PreOrder (f sup_X) (supremum_cpo (E.image f X) Hdir) u H3 (H2 H6)))).

assert (Hf_sup : is_supremum_of (f sup_X) (E.image f X)).
{ apply continuous_preserves_supremum; assumption. }
split.
- intro H; apply (supremum_unique (E.image f X) (f sup_X) sup_Y Hf_sup H).
- intro H; rewrite <- H; exact Hf_sup.

attempts: intro Heq. rewrite <- Heq. exact (continuous_sup D D' PROSET PROSET' CPO CPO' f CONTINUOUS X DIRECTED SUPREMUM).

intro H_eqY. assert (H_mon := ScottContinuousMap_isMonotonic f CONTINUIOUS). assert (H_img_dir : isDirected (E.image f X)) by
  exact (let (NONEMPTY, _) := DIRECTED in
         let (x0, Hx0) := NONEMPTY in
         isDirected_intro (E.image f X)
           (ex_intro (fun x' : D' => E.In x' (E.image f X)) (f x0)
              (In_image D D' f X (f x0) x0 eq_refl Hx0))
           (fun y1 y2 Hy1 Hy2 =>
              let (x1, Heq1, Hx1) := Hy1 in
              let (x2, Heq2, Hx2) := Hy2 in
              let (_, H_dir) := DIRECTED in
              let (x3, conj Hx3 (conj Hle1 Hle2)) := H_dir x1 x2 Hx1 Hx2 in
              ex_intro (fun x' : D' => and (E.In x' (E.image f X))
                                           (and (leProp y1 x') (leProp y2 x'))) (f x3)
                (conj (In_image D D' f X (f x3) x3 eq_refl Hx3)
                      (conj (PreOrder_Transitive (leProp_PreOrder D' PROSET') y1 (f x1) (f x3)
                                (eq_ind (f x1) (fun y => leProp y (f x1))
                                   (PreOrder_Reflexive (leProp_PreOrder D' PROSET') (f x1)) y1 Heq1)
                                (H_mon x1 x3 Hle1))
                            (PreOrder_Transitive (leProp_PreOrder D' PROSET') y2 (f x2) (f x3)
                                (eq_ind (f x2) (fun y => leProp y (f x2))
                                   (PreOrder_Reflexive (leProp_PreOrder D' PROSET') (f x2)) y2 Heq2)
                                (H_mon x2 x3 Hle2)))))). assert (H_eq_sup : f sup_X == supremum_cpo (E.image f X) H_img_dir) by
  exact (f_sup_X_eq_sup_image_f_X f X sup_X CONTINUIOUS DIRECTED SUPREMUM H_img_dir). assert (H_sup_img := CPO'.(supremum_cpo_spec) (E.image f X) H_img_dir). destruct (proj1 (PROSET'.(leProp_PartialOrder) (f sup_X) sup_Y) H_eqY) as [Hle_fX_Y Hle_Y_fX];
destruct (proj1 (PROSET'.(leProp_PartialOrder) (f sup_X) (supremum_cpo (E.image f X) H_img_dir)) H_eq_sup) as [Hle_fX_img Hle_img_fX]. unfold is_supremum_of; intro u; split.
- intro Hle_supY_u; apply (proj1 (H_sup_img u) (PreOrder_Transitive (leProp_PreOrder D' PROSET') (supremum_cpo (E.image f X) H_img_dir) (f sup_X) u Hle_img_fX (PreOrder_Transitive (leProp_PreOrder D' PROSET') (f sup_X) sup_Y u Hle_fX_Y Hle_supY_u))).
- intro H_upper; apply (PreOrder_Transitive (leProp_PreOrder D' PROSET') sup_Y (f sup_X) u Hle_Y_fX (PreOrder_Transitive (leProp_PreOrder D' PROSET') (f sup_X) (supremum_cpo (E.image f X) H_img_dir) u Hle_fX_img (proj2 (H_sup_img u) H_upper))).
intro H_eq. setoid_rewrite H_eq. apply continuous_sup; assumption.
intros H_eq. setoid_rewrite H_eq. apply continuous_supremum; assumption.
failed_attempts: intro Heq. rewrite <- Heq. exact (continuous_sup D D' PROSET PROSET' CPO CPO' f CONTINUOUS X DIRECTED SUPREMUM).

  exact (let (NONEMPTY, _) := DIRECTED in
         let (x0, Hx0) := NONEMPTY in
         isDirected_intro (E.image f X)
           (ex_intro (fun x' : D' => E.In x' (E.image f X)) (f x0)
              (In_image D D' f X (f x0) x0 eq_refl Hx0))

              let (_, H_dir) := DIRECTED in

  exact (f_sup_X_eq_sup_image_f_X f X sup_X CONTINUIOUS DIRECTED SUPREMUM H_img_dir). assert (H_sup_img := CPO'.(supremum_cpo_spec) (E.image f X) H_img_dir). destruct (proj1 (PROSET'.(leProp_PartialOrder) (f sup_X) sup_Y) H_eqY) as [Hle_fX_Y Hle_Y_fX];
destruct (proj1 (PROSET'.(leProp_PartialOrder) (f sup_X) (supremum_cpo (E.image f X) H_img_dir)) H_eq_sup) as [Hle_fX_img Hle_img_fX]. unfold is_supremum_of; intro u; split.
- intro Hle_supY_u; apply (proj1 (H_sup_img u) (PreOrder_Transitive (leProp_PreOrder D' PROSET') (supremum_cpo (E.image f X) H_img_dir) (f sup_X) u Hle_img_fX (PreOrder_Transitive (leProp_PreOrder D' PROSET') (f sup_X) sup_Y u Hle_fX_Y Hle_supY_u))).
- intro H_upper; apply (PreOrder_Transitive (leProp_PreOrder D' PROSET') sup_Y (f sup_X) u Hle_Y_fX (PreOrder_Transitive (leProp_PreOrder D' PROSET') (f sup_X) (supremum_cpo (E.image f X) H_img_dir) u Hle_fX_img (proj2 (H_sup_img u) H_upper))).
